ogTitle: King Scrub vs Kingaham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in King Scrub and Kingaham.
heading: King Scrub vs Kingaham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between King Scrub, Queensland and Kingaham, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: King Scrub has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Kingaham (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is King Scrub or Kingaham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: King Scrub has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Kingaham scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: King Scrub scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Kingaham scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in King Scrub or Kingaham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. King Scrub has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
